description_long: This object is a heavily damaged office printer, featuring a boxy, multi-tiered structure with extensive cracks, holes, and jagged edges throughout its exterior. The main body is primarily white with black and red accents, and the surface damage reveals an inner red layer beneath the outer shell. The front face displays a shattered control panel with a red button and a broken display, as well as a large, irregularly shaped opening where the paper tray would typically be. The sides and back are similarly marred, with deep gouges and missing chunks, exposing the internal structure. The top section includes a recessed area, likely for document feeding, but it is also partially destroyed. Overall, the printer appears non-functional and abandoned, suitable for a post-apocalyptic or urban decay setting.
description: A severely damaged, boxy office printer with shattered panels, exposed red interior, and a broken control panel. The exterior is white with black and red details, featuring extensive cracks and holes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broken control panel, a red button, and large jagged holes in the main body, revealing red interior layers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights deep cracks and missing sections, with a protruding broken panel and a mostly intact top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the most extensive damage, with large, irregular holes and exposed red interior, lacking any visible functional components.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals horizontal slats and deep gouges, with the most pronounced exposure of the red inner structure.
attribute_control_panel_design: A small, rectangular control panel is located on the upper left front, featuring a broken display and a prominent red button.
